channel.title: morganjay TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from morganjay

item.title: if you ever wondered what it’s like to do a show for 5000 people and you do a show and leave and people are waiting to take pics with you this is what it’s like. Thanks so much phoenix! One more show to go tomorrow night!!!! Morgan jay phoenix Arizona sho
item.description: if you ever wondered what it’s like to do a show for 5000 people and you do a show and leave and people are waiting to take pics with you this is what it’s like. Thanks so much phoenix! One more show to go tomorrow night!!!! Morgan jay phoenix Arizona sho
item.author: morganjay

item.title: They double teamed me. This was filmed in NYC at the town hall theater 2025. Those were some special shows and FYI if you like the goofy gang sweater I’m wearing we still have some in stock. Done miss out get! Get yours!!! Merch at goofygang dot com Tick
item.description: They double teamed me. This was filmed in NYC at the town hall theater 2025. Those were some special shows and FYI if you like the goofy gang sweater I’m wearing we still have some in stock. Done miss out get! Get yours!!! Merch at goofygang dot com Tick
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Another sold out show tonight at the celebrity theater. An incredible run of shows this weekend. Almost 10000 people came out to see me. Beyond happy and grateful! Morgan jay in Phoenix
item.description: Another sold out show tonight at the celebrity theater. An incredible run of shows this weekend. Almost 10000 people came out to see me. Beyond happy and grateful! Morgan jay in Phoenix
item.author: morganjay

item.title: You know I would try to tell you what it was like, but I think you just had to be there. These photos were taken at the iconic celebrity theatre in Phoenix Arizona almost 10,000 tickets sold over the weekend between Albuquerque and Phoenix and I can’t tha
item.description: You know I would try to tell you what it was like, but I think you just had to be there. These photos were taken at the iconic celebrity theatre in Phoenix Arizona almost 10,000 tickets sold over the weekend between Albuquerque and Phoenix and I can’t tha
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Did he hit the beat right or naaaa. I forget where this was filmed: I think Denver? Last year? Tonight two big shows in Indianapolis, Lexington Kentucky tomorrow. Then Columbus Ohio. Tour dates 4/30 - Indianapolis, IN 5/1 - Lexington, KY 5/2 - Columbus,
item.description: Did he hit the beat right or naaaa. I forget where this was filmed: I think Denver? Last year? Tonight two big shows in Indianapolis, Lexington Kentucky tomorrow. Then Columbus Ohio. Tour dates 4/30 - Indianapolis, IN 5/1 - Lexington, KY 5/2 - Columbus,
item.author: morganjay

item.title: I remember the show, this was Orlando Florida February 14. I remember the show because I was vomiting all day and I had diarrhoea and I was dehydrated and lightheaded and I went through the first show and then with the second show I had to pull the plug.
item.description: I remember the show, this was Orlando Florida February 14. I remember the show because I was vomiting all day and I had diarrhoea and I was dehydrated and lightheaded and I went through the first show and then with the second show I had to pull the plug.
item.author: morganjay

item.title: NEW VLOG dropped on my YouTube channel. Make sure to go watch. Shout out to @Mister Fácil who made a very cool cameo in this one. Sold out show tonight in Colombia Ohio! Take me back!!!!! 5/4 - Los Angeles 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16 - Bossier City, LA 5/23 -
item.description: NEW VLOG dropped on my YouTube channel. Make sure to go watch. Shout out to @Mister Fácil who made a very cool cameo in this one. Sold out show tonight in Colombia Ohio! Take me back!!!!! 5/4 - Los Angeles 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16 - Bossier City, LA 5/23 -
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Just got off stage in Ohio. This POV doesn’t necessarily do it justice. You just kinda had to be there but I want you guys to see what it’s like to be me. I had a great time in Columbus Ohio. Shout out to everybody who came out!
item.description: Just got off stage in Ohio. This POV doesn’t necessarily do it justice. You just kinda had to be there but I want you guys to see what it’s like to be me. I had a great time in Columbus Ohio. Shout out to everybody who came out!
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This was filmed in NYC at the town hall theater in February of last year. Thank you to the homie in the front row who brought bandaids and the girl who brought me napkins. That cut actually left a scar and took forever to heal 😩😩😩 5/4 - Los Angeles 5/15 -
item.description: This was filmed in NYC at the town hall theater in February of last year. Thank you to the homie in the front row who brought bandaids and the girl who brought me napkins. That cut actually left a scar and took forever to heal 😩😩😩 5/4 - Los Angeles 5/15 -
item.author: morganjay

item.title: I thought it’d be cool to show you this point of view. This was filmed in Nashville at the Ryman auditorium. It’s cool to see the clips but it’s even cooler to be making it happen. Thanks to everybody who came to those shows in Nashville they were one of
item.description: I thought it’d be cool to show you this point of view. This was filmed in Nashville at the Ryman auditorium. It’s cool to see the clips but it’s even cooler to be making it happen. Thanks to everybody who came to those shows in Nashville they were one of
item.author: morganjay

item.title: This was filmed in New York last year on February. Shout to everybody who came out hard to believe it’s already May so much has happened. 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16 - Bossier City, LA 5/23 - Edmonton, AB 5/24 - Calgary, AB 6/5 - Atlanta, GA 6/6 - Hollywood,
item.description: This was filmed in New York last year on February. Shout to everybody who came out hard to believe it’s already May so much has happened. 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16 - Bossier City, LA 5/23 - Edmonton, AB 5/24 - Calgary, AB 6/5 - Atlanta, GA 6/6 - Hollywood,
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Filmed in St Louis last year. Had two great sold out shows there. Shout out to everyone who came out to this shows in 2025z 2026 bigger and bigger. Next show on the list in in Dallas. Tickets left for one of my biggest shows of the year. Otherwise tour da
item.description: Filmed in St Louis last year. Had two great sold out shows there. Shout out to everyone who came out to this shows in 2025z 2026 bigger and bigger. Next show on the list in in Dallas. Tickets left for one of my biggest shows of the year. Otherwise tour da
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Filmed this in London back in may of last year. Still figuring out tour dates for my next European tour. Lots of things to think about and consider but in the mean time there are tickets left for my American tour in some cities. So check it out! 5/15 - D
item.description: Filmed this in London back in may of last year. Still figuring out tour dates for my next European tour. Lots of things to think about and consider but in the mean time there are tickets left for my American tour in some cities. So check it out! 5/15 - D
item.author: morganjay

item.title: THIS IS PROBABLY THE MOST INSANE CLIP I have posted in a while. The story behind granny is wild and one day I might get to tell it to you. this was filmed at the Ryman auditorium in nashville. You really never know what’s gonna happen in a Morgan Jay sho
item.description: THIS IS PROBABLY THE MOST INSANE CLIP I have posted in a while. The story behind granny is wild and one day I might get to tell it to you. this was filmed at the Ryman auditorium in nashville. You really never know what’s gonna happen in a Morgan Jay sho
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Trinity was a good sport. Shout out to nashville for bringing good energy to the Ryman auditorium and to masih for letting me use him for views. More to come in the coming months. Very excited to announce! 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16 - Bossier City, LA 5/23 -
item.description: Trinity was a good sport. Shout out to nashville for bringing good energy to the Ryman auditorium and to masih for letting me use him for views. More to come in the coming months. Very excited to announce! 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16 - Bossier City, LA 5/23 -
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Goofy guy bit! Something you only see with the full band show. This was in nashville at the Ryman auditorium. Big thanks to everyone who came to those shows. I kind of leaned into this whole goofy guy thing. It sort of happened naturally and as a fluke.
item.description: Goofy guy bit! Something you only see with the full band show. This was in nashville at the Ryman auditorium. Big thanks to everyone who came to those shows. I kind of leaned into this whole goofy guy thing. It sort of happened naturally and as a fluke.
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Ion even care if the clip goes viral, this clip tells a story and puts a smile on my face. Shout out to everyone this dude and everyone else who came out to the nashville shows at the Ryman auditorium. Tour dates below. If you’re in the video comment with
item.description: Ion even care if the clip goes viral, this clip tells a story and puts a smile on my face. Shout out to everyone this dude and everyone else who came out to the nashville shows at the Ryman auditorium. Tour dates below. If you’re in the video comment with
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Filmed in nashville, I been doing this bit for like 5 years and it never fails. Some people just don’t come with that proper energy. Big show this weekend for Dallas. I know there’s still some tickets left so grab yours ASAP. 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16 - Bo
item.description: Filmed in nashville, I been doing this bit for like 5 years and it never fails. Some people just don’t come with that proper energy. Big show this weekend for Dallas. I know there’s still some tickets left so grab yours ASAP. 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16 - Bo
item.author: morganjay

item.title: What’s it like to be me at a sold out show. This was the second at the Ryman auditorium in Nashville. Top view is my view and bottom view is Masih’s view. Those shows were fun af. Sold out show tomorrow in Dallas!!! Might be some tickets left. 5/15 - Dall
item.description: What’s it like to be me at a sold out show. This was the second at the Ryman auditorium in Nashville. Top view is my view and bottom view is Masih’s view. Those shows were fun af. Sold out show tomorrow in Dallas!!! Might be some tickets left. 5/15 - Dall
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Collab with @snapchat allowing us to see the audience memebers true colors. Shout out to everyone who came to the show in nashville. Lot of good moments. Lotta good people. Sold out show in Dallas tonight! Louisiana tomorrow night. 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16
item.description: Collab with @snapchat allowing us to see the audience memebers true colors. Shout out to everyone who came to the show in nashville. Lot of good moments. Lotta good people. Sold out show in Dallas tonight! Louisiana tomorrow night. 5/15 - Dallas, TX 5/16
item.author: morganjay

item.title: BARCELONA!!!! new vlog just dropped. Shout to all the special guests that showed up! Barcelona was one of the coolest places we went on this trip!!!! You know where to find it.
item.description: BARCELONA!!!! new vlog just dropped. Shout to all the special guests that showed up! Barcelona was one of the coolest places we went on this trip!!!! You know where to find it.
item.author: morganjay

item.title: WHY HE LOOK LIKE HENRY CAVILL?? This is a part of the show I have grown to love. Also in partnership with @snapchat chat this was a a super cool. Currently stuck and delayed in Louisiana. It could be worse. 5/23 - Edmonton, AB 5/24 - Calgary, AB 6/5 - A
item.description: WHY HE LOOK LIKE HENRY CAVILL?? This is a part of the show I have grown to love. Also in partnership with @snapchat chat this was a a super cool. Currently stuck and delayed in Louisiana. It could be worse. 5/23 - Edmonton, AB 5/24 - Calgary, AB 6/5 - A
item.author: morganjay

item.title: I just wanna go home. Too many delays and canceled flights. I just wanna go home.
item.description: I just wanna go home. Too many delays and canceled flights. I just wanna go home.
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Can you believe he grabbed her neck like that in public? not going to lie I kind of liked it. The Nashville show went crazy people were horny and having a good time. Tour dates below. 6/5 - Atlanta, GA 6/6 - Hollywood, FL 6/12 - Milwaukee, WI 6/14 - Prio
item.description: Can you believe he grabbed her neck like that in public? not going to lie I kind of liked it. The Nashville show went crazy people were horny and having a good time. Tour dates below. 6/5 - Atlanta, GA 6/6 - Hollywood, FL 6/12 - Milwaukee, WI 6/14 - Prio
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Hey everyone, the Shows that I’m supposed to do in Canada this weekend are going to be rescheduled. I appreciate your patience and understanding with this. I am aware that people do plan their lives around events sometimes, they hire babysitters, they res
item.description: Hey everyone, the Shows that I’m supposed to do in Canada this weekend are going to be rescheduled. I appreciate your patience and understanding with this. I am aware that people do plan their lives around events sometimes, they hire babysitters, they res
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Shout out to this guy. I hope he’s doing okay. This is film in Toronto back in February of last year 2025 shot to everybody who came to the Shows TORONTO always goes hard and maybe next time I go there it will be an arena… 6/5 - Atlanta, GA 6/6 - Hollywo
item.description: Shout out to this guy. I hope he’s doing okay. This is film in Toronto back in February of last year 2025 shot to everybody who came to the Shows TORONTO always goes hard and maybe next time I go there it will be an arena… 6/5 - Atlanta, GA 6/6 - Hollywo
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Yo, why do me and the two guys in this video look the same? This was filmed in Toronto last year 2025 around February. This was a wild weekend because I had eight shows in a row it was super exhausting! Next time I’m in Toronto I will be doing an arena
item.description: Yo, why do me and the two guys in this video look the same? This was filmed in Toronto last year 2025 around February. This was a wild weekend because I had eight shows in a row it was super exhausting! Next time I’m in Toronto I will be doing an arena
item.author: morganjay

item.title: just making a bunch of stickers for everyone on the internet. Live long and prosper. Also I recognise my shirt a lil dirty.
item.description: just making a bunch of stickers for everyone on the internet. Live long and prosper. Also I recognise my shirt a lil dirty.
item.author: morganjay

item.title: I always try to make wrapping up my shows as easy as possible. But no matter what nerves and pressure get the best of us and sometimes we miss the beat but no matter what it’s always good to HAWKATUAH on that thang. 6/5 - Atlanta, GA 6/6 - Hollywood, FL
item.description: I always try to make wrapping up my shows as easy as possible. But no matter what nerves and pressure get the best of us and sometimes we miss the beat but no matter what it’s always good to HAWKATUAH on that thang. 6/5 - Atlanta, GA 6/6 - Hollywood, FL
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Bro this was the weirdest 90 seconds of my life, I had no idea what was going on. Every one of these dudes I picked on had such a different energy. It was bizarre. announce the European tour dates next week so don’t miss that. Had to reschedule my shows
item.description: Bro this was the weirdest 90 seconds of my life, I had no idea what was going on. Every one of these dudes I picked on had such a different energy. It was bizarre. announce the European tour dates next week so don’t miss that. Had to reschedule my shows
item.author: morganjay

item.title: Tickets are officially available for everybody. Make sure you go to MY WABSYTE - do not google my name and your city. You will get scammed. If you’re city is not listed it’s because I was already there been there within the last 12-18months and you found
item.description: Tickets are officially available for everybody. Make sure you go to MY WABSYTE - do not google my name and your city. You will get scammed. If you’re city is not listed it’s because I was already there been there within the last 12-18months and you found
item.author: morganjay

item.title: FINALLY THE TIME HAS COME TO THE SOUTHERN HEMISPHERE. And to places I’ve never been before. To continue the world tour. To meet new people and make new friends. Pre sale is Wednesday - only for mailing list. General sale is friday - for everyone! Octobe
item.description: FINALLY THE TIME HAS COME TO THE SOUTHERN HEMISPHERE. And to places I’ve never been before. To continue the world tour. To meet new people and make new friends. Pre sale is Wednesday - only for mailing list. General sale is friday - for everyone! Octobe
item.author: morganjay

item.title: My brand team told me I had to promote my merch. Thank you for watching this. I promise I won’t post too many things like this 😅😅😅 shout out to the editor @filmopino for cooking this up. Sold out shows this weekend in Charlotte and Nashiville!
item.description: My brand team told me I had to promote my merch. Thank you for watching this. I promise I won’t post too many things like this 😅😅😅 shout out to the editor @filmopino for cooking this up. Sold out shows this weekend in Charlotte and Nashiville!
item.author: morganjay
